response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive technical expertise and leadership in software development, particularly in open-source and full-stack environments. While his experience aligns well with the technical and architectural demands of the role, his German language proficiency is a notable gap, and his leadership experience is more hands-on than executive-level.
strengths: Strong technical background in software development, architecture, and open-source projects (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts).
Proven ability to mentor teams and share knowledge through workshops, talks, and community engagement.
Diverse experience across multiple domains (web, mobile, embedded, AI) and technologies (Python, Linux, UML-adjacent modeling).
concerns: German language proficiency is listed as 'Basic,' falling short of the required C1 level.
Leadership experience is primarily hands-on (e.g., Staff Engineer roles) rather than executive-level operational oversight.
Limited explicit evidence of strategic client advisory or high-level IT security/compliance experience.
